languages.text: "Данная жизнеформа оценивает это как следствие успешного применения ободряющих литаний, что вернули мощь машинному духу".

traits.locale_text: "Данная единица оценивает это как следствие успешного применения ободряющих литаний, что вернули мощь машинному духу".

languages.text: "This life form assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."
languages.original_text: "Данная жизнеформа оценивает это как следствие успешного применения ободряющих литаний, что вернули мощь машинному духу".

traits.locale_text: "This unit assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."
"This unit assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."
"This unit assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."

languages.text: 「このユニットは、機械霊の力を回復させた活力ある呪文の成功した適用が原因であると判断している」
languages.original_text: "This unit assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."

languages.text: "Bu yaşam formu, bunu makine ruhuna kudretini geri kazandıran canlandırıcı ilahilerin başarılı uygulamasının bir sonucu olarak değerlendirmekte."
languages.original_text: "This life form assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."

traits.locale_text: "Bu yaşam formu, bunu makine ruhuna kudretini geri kazandıran canlandırıcı ilahilerin başarılı uygulamasının bir sonucu olarak değerlendirmekte."

languages.text: “本生命体评估判定：此乃复苏祷词成功施行的效果，机魂权能已得再造。”
languages.original_text: "This life form assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."

traits.locale_text: “本生命体评估判定：此乃复苏祷词成功施行的效果，机魂权能已得再造。”

languages.text: "Diese Lebensform bewertet dies als Folge der erfolgreichen Anwendung der belebenden Litaneien, die die Kraft des Maschinengeistes wiederhergestellt haben."
languages.original_text: "This life form assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Lebensform bewertet dies als Folge der erfolgreichen Anwendung der belebenden Litaneien, die die Kraft des Maschinengeistes wiederhergestellt haben."

languages.text: « Selon l'analyse de cette entité, il s'agit de la conséquence de l'application réussie des litanies revigorantes qui ont rétabli la puissance à l'esprit de la machine. »
languages.original_text: "This life form assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."

traits.locale_text: « Selon l'analyse de cette entité, il s'agit de la conséquence de l'application réussie des litanies revigorantes qui ont rétabli la puissance à l'esprit de la machine. »

languages.text: «Esta forma de vida calcula que es una consecuencia de la correcta aplicación de las letanías vigorizantes que devolvieron la potencia a este espíritu máquina».
languages.original_text: "This life form assesses this as a consequence of the successful application of the reinvigorating litanies that restored potency to the machine spirit."

traits.locale_text: «Esta forma de vida calcula que es una consecuencia de la correcta aplicación de las letanías vigorizantes que devolvieron la potencia a este espíritu máquina».
